description: DEEPSHIP Interrupt Routing conformance test suite.

cases.name: active lane with simple question routes to CACHE_ANSWER
active lane with find task routes to SMALL_CONTEXT_TASK
cases.intent: find where the login function is defined

cases.name: active lane with implement feature routes to NEW_LANE_LONG_TASK
cases.intent: implement a new authentication module with OAuth2 support

cases.name: active lane with change request routes to MODIFY_CURRENT_PLAN
cases.intent: actually change the button color to red

cases.name: no active lane enters normal state machine
active lane with ambiguous two-word input triggers clarification
active lane with replacement intent
cases.intent: replace the auth system with OAuth2

cases.name: SMALL_CONTEXT_TASK pauses lane
cases.intent: find the login function in the codebase

cases.name: NEW_LANE_LONG_TASK pauses lane
cases.intent: build a new CI/CD pipeline from scratch

cases.name: MODIFY_CURRENT_PLAN pauses lane
cases.intent: change the plan to use PostgreSQL instead
